chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 44 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection a/w. reply at ‘A’. 2) For hearing of Main Case. 3) For hearing of CMA No.374/2025. 26.08.2025. Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for Respondent No.1. ________________ Mr. Aqib Hussain, advocate has files power on behalf of appellant and argued this appeal. After arguing at some length, he submits that he would be satisfied if the trial Court is directed to decide the suit within a short period preferably in six months as thereby the claims of the parties will be finally adjudicated on evidence. Learned counsel for the respondent No.1 is satisfied. Accordingly, this appeal is disposed of along with listed application(s) in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
